snippet.title: Classroom Window Longplay | Cozy Chill Vocals for Study & Note-Taking
snippet.description:
A cozy classroom-window vocal longplay for studying, reading, note-taking, desk work, or a quiet afternoon break.

This episode follows small college classroom moments before anyone says too much out loud: chalk on the window rail, a sun-side seat, pencil taps before the bell, folded quiz corners, library stamps, study room reservations, Monday highlighter marks, a turned campus map, blank notebook margins, a notice pin by the stairs, a projector cord, the last slide, and a window latch after class.

Soft vocals, mellow keys, clean guitar, rounded bass, light brushed drums, airy pads, and gentle city-pop / soft R&B color keep the mood calm and background-friendly.

Disclosure: this episode uses AI-assisted music and visual production workflows plus human source review, selection gates, provenance tracking, and listening/QA checks before any release decision.

Chapters:
00:00 Chalk Dust on the Window Rail
03:04 Second Seat from the Sun
06:05 Pencil Tap Before the Bell
08:39 Folded Quiz at the Corner
11:37 Library Stamp at 3:10
14:58 Study Room Reservation
17:51 Highlighter Under Monday
21:01 Campus Map Turned Sideways
23:52 Notebook Margin, Left Blank
26:55 Notice Pin by the Stairs
31:05 Projector Cord Across the Floor
34:01 Last Slide Before Dismissal
37:11 Window Latch After Class
